meanings.definition: turning in an opposite direction or position
examples: the reversal of the image in the lens

meanings.definition: turn abruptly and face the other way, either physically or metaphorically
examples: He turned around to face his opponent
My conscience told me to turn around before I made a mistake
The new strategy turned around sales
The tutor turned around my son's performance in math

meanings.definition: improve significantly; go from bad to good
examples: Her performance in school picked up
